recommended_use: highest-priority photoreal base generation target once local workflow proof exists
multi-reference identity/reference-heavy scenes after reference contract proof
complex prompt adherence where Flux2 workflow is available
blocked_until: object_info shows required Flux2 nodes/loaders
Flux2 model assets are hash-registered and local/EC2 path verified
single-image base smoke proof passes
reference workflow proof passes if using multi-reference
QA evidence and promotion gate pass

recommended_use: default base image generation when Flux2 is not yet proven
general photoreal composition and prompt adherence
image-first scenes that later receive SDXL regional detail or video handoff
blocked_until: Flux1 workflow JSON exists in API executable form
model loader compatibility is verified
base image output evidence passes

recommended_use: fast object_info/model-loader smoke tests
cheap prompt sanity check
fallback when higher-quality base lane is unavailable
blocked_until: runtime output evidence exists for exact lane prefix
bridge_policy: not a final quality lane without later QA/detail passes

recommended_use: when SDXL LoRA stack is required
RealVisXL-style local realism where exact checkpoint is verified
regional inpaint/detail handoff and post-Flux refinement
blocked_until: checkpoint name, engine family, and LoRA stack family agree
current lane model-loader compatibility is verified
base output evidence passes
bridge_policy: can receive Flux image bridge through image/load/refine only

recommended_use: fast alternative base render
comparison branch against Flux/SDXL
fallback if Flux model loading is unavailable
blocked_until: Z-Image workflow API template is separated from Flux naming
runtime output evidence exists
QA shows acceptable anatomy/composition for requested scene

recommended_use: only when the exact requested asset/checkpoint/profile is Pony-family
specialty style/pose/anatomy profile testing where SDXL/Flux cannot cover it
controlled branch experiments with separate QA and tags
blocked_until: Pony checkpoint and prompt/tag profile are registered
Pony-specific workflow template exists
Pony outputs pass composition/identity/QA gates
no SDXL/Flux/SD1.5 LoRA mixing

recommended_use: fallback when Flux/Z-Image/Pony lane fails validation
basic composition proof
safe rerun after model-loading failures
blocked_until: fallback template uses a clean verified SDXL checkpoint
no incompatible LoRA stack is applied
fallback output evidence passes
bridge_policy: can feed upscale/detail/video handoff after QA

recommended_use: only for legacy tools or models that have no SDXL/Flux equivalent
small region/reference experiments when quality loss is acceptable
blocked_until: explicit user/scene requirement exists
separate SD1.5 template and checkpoint proof exist
no cross-family LoRA mixing
bridge_policy: never promote as primary hyperreal base unless manually approved after QA
